case_title: PEREZ, ROSA VS NEVAREZ, BARNIE & NEVAREZ RENE.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE ON BARNIE NEVAREZ, FILED. PERSONALLY SERVED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PEREZ, ROSA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEVAREZ, BARNIE & NEVAREZ RENE. $1,008.96 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,008.96 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT NEVAREZ, BARNIE & NEVAREZ RENE.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT NEVAREZ, BARNIE & NEVAREZ RENE.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $1,041.17 AS TO DEFENDANT NEVAREZ, BARNIE & NEVAREZ RENE.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT NEVAREZ, BARNIE & NEVAREZ RENE.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,008.90 FILED BY PEREZ, ROSA AS TO DEFENDANT NEVAREZ, BARNIE & NEVAREZ RENE. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-01-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PLTF'S APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF FEES, GRANTED.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NEVAREZ, BARNIE & NEVAREZ RENE.
